notes: This batch of 257 MileDown MCAT cloze cards (Physics, Biology, Behavioral, Organic Chemistry) is high quality: cloze {{cN::...}} markup is balanced, HTML is reasonably balanced, no LaTeX/MathJax is present, and question/answer text is rendered cleanly with no unrendered template artifacts. The only genuine defect is one card whose Khan Academy link href has a stray " entity (broken source URL). Four 'give the equation' cards encode the answer solely as an image, so their answer_text contains no textual answer (info); a larger set of ~29 organic-chemistry 'identify the structure' cards are image-dependent on the question side but have valid text answers and balanced markup, so they were not flagged.
